packageRules.description: Group all base-image bumps in a single PR per week.
Auto-merge patch updates for upstream Garage; we'll still see the PR for visibility, but it merges itself if CI is green.
NEVER auto-merge majors. Wizard sleeps when major upgrades break things.
Group GitHub Actions workflow updates separately so they don't pollute image-bump PRs.
Pin python base image to 3.12. kokoro-onnx 0.5.0 requires <3.14, and Renovate's 'docker base images' bump to 3.14 broke the build. Allow patch updates within 3.12.x only.
